user.title: Dartford Bin Collections
user.description:
Enter your property details to fetch bin collection dates from Dartford Borough Council.

Find your UPRN at https://www.findmyaddress.co.uk/

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Dartford Borough Council portal. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: No bin data returned. Please double-check your UPRN and postcode.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: Dartford Bin Collections is already configured.
